overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a post-apocalyptic game showing a character walking up a muddy mountain trail. The scene features overcast winter weather with patchy snow, rocky cliffs, and dense vegetation transitioning to pine trees as the character ascends.

scene_state.functional_zone: mountain trail between cliff and dense shrubbery

agents.ego_description: walking steadily uphill on a muddy path carrying a rifle on his back and a backpack

entered.detail: tall gray rock formation running alongside the left side of the path
wooden power pole with crossbars and wires extending along the trail
thick dark green and brown bushes lining the right side of the path
foggy forested mountains visible in the distant hazy background

segments.scene_description: The character walks up a narrow muddy mountain trail bordered by a rocky cliff on the left and dense shrubbery on the right. A wooden utility pole stands ahead on the path, with foggy mountains visible in the distance under an overcast sky.

events.description: vegetation on right transitions from dense shrubs to coniferous pine trees

agents.ego_description: continuing uphill past the utility pole as the trail becomes rockier and more open

entered.detail: tall evergreen pine trees replacing the earlier shrubbery on the right side

segments.scene_description: As the character continues ascending, the dense bushes give way to taller pine trees on the right while the path becomes rockier. The utility pole is passed and recedes to the left rear, with the foggy mountain backdrop remaining constant.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous ascent up a mountain trail that transitions from a shrub-lined path into a rocky pine forest. It begins with the character walking along a narrow muddy track bordered by a steep rocky cliff and dense shrubbery under a heavy overcast sky. As the character moves forward, the camera passes a wooden utility pole that recedes into the distance while the terrain becomes increasingly rocky. The scene then shifts as the low bushes on the right give way to towering pine trees, all while the foggy mountain backdrop remains a constant presence.
